title: bursera gibarensis
intro: Bursera gibarensis, also known as the "Cuipo", is a tree species native to Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Bursera gibarensis include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and protect against oxidative stress. Bursera gibarensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its resin is also used in traditional medicine.
